name: verylegit-marketplace
description: Productivity and personality plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: debate
plugins.description: Adversarial debate with three AI subagents — Proponent argues for, Critic argues against, Judge delivers verdict. Stress-test any plan or decision.

plugins.name: wtf
plugins.description: Like /btw but angry — expresses dramatic frustration and disappointment before answering your question clearly and correctly.

plugins.name: bear-notes
plugins.description: MCP server + skills for the Bear note-taking app. Search, read, create, and manage Bear notes directly from Claude Code.
